title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction / Preschool Director
notes: Dual role: Director of Curriculum and Instruction and Preschool Director (oversees Bitty Bucks preschool program). Email domain is bcbucks.org per Zoominfo (partial mask d***@bcbucks.org). District serves grades PK-12. Small rural district in Crawford County.

title: Director of Curriculum, Assessment, Instruction and Grants
notes: District operates a preschool. Listed on Bucyrus staff directory but emails masked behind contact form (district uses Apptegy/Finalsite — no public emails). Reach via central office or web contact form.

title: Director of Curriculum, Assessment and School Improvement
notes: Confirmed via multiple sources (Zoominfo, district leadership page). Morrow County district, ~1,000 students. Email format firstname.lastname@cardington.k12.oh.us.

title: Superintendent
notes: No public-facing Curriculum Director found; superintendent Jeff Fortkamp listed in staff records. District runs Head Start in partnership with Mercer County ESC. Email domain @celinaschools.org but addresses masked behind district contact form.

title: Assistant Superintendent (Curriculum & Instruction)
notes: Hired 2016 as Assistant Superintendent focused on curriculum and instructional practice. District operates Chardon Early Learning Center (CELC) preschool. Geauga County district.

title: Superintendent
notes: No dedicated curriculum director publicly listed. Tuscarawas County district. Email addresses not shown publicly on district directory.

title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Confirmed Director of Curriculum and Instruction at Cloverleaf via LinkedIn and district sources. District serves ~2,293 students PK-12 in Medina County. Email not publicly listed; format likely first.last@cloverleaflocal.org.

title: Superintendent
notes: Veteran superintendent; small district (~1,100 students) without dedicated curriculum director. Superintendent is appropriate ECE decision-maker. Note: Three Columbiana administrators eyeing retire-rehire in 2025.

title: Director of Instruction
notes: Per Ohio Auditor of State recommendation, district does not publish email addresses online. Use district contact form at copley-fairlawn.org or call direct number. Summit County district.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small Crawford County district (~700 students) — superintendent acts as primary curriculum decision-maker. District runs Crestline Preschool (54 students, PK). Henderson previously was curriculum director at Bucyrus.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural Perry County district. No dedicated curriculum director. Email format likely follows @crooksville.k12.oh.us or @crooksville.org pattern but not confirmed.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small Knox County district. Superintendent acts as ECE decision-maker.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small Allen/Van Wert County district. No dedicated curriculum director found; superintendent is primary contact.

title: Superintendent
notes: Appointed superintendent May 2024 with 3-year contract. District began strategic planning process in 2025. Small Knox County district.

title: Superintendent
notes: Eastern Local (Meigs County) — small rural district. Note: Multiple Ohio districts use 'Eastern Local'; this one is in Reedsville, OH (Meigs County). Email domain @elsd.us per Zoominfo (masked j***@elsd.us).

title: Superintendent
notes: Edison Local in Jefferson County (Hammondsville). District uses edisonwildcats.org for email; .k12.oh.us URL is legacy. ~1,500 students PK-12 across 3 buildings.

title: Director of EMIS and Curriculum
notes: Small Wood County district. Email format likely firstname.lastname@elmwood.k12.oh.us based on district directory structure but not confirmed.

title: Director of Curriculum, Instruction, and Special Programs
notes: Active in Science of Reading alignment. Email domain likely @fairless.sparcc.org (Stark County districts use SPARCC). Michael Hearn (former curriculum director) was promoted to Superintendent in 2023.

title: Interim Superintendent
notes: Returned from retirement as interim superintendent for 2025-26 after sudden resignation of Jason Spencer. 28-year district veteran. Small Athens County district. Note district uses fhlancers.com email domain (not fedhock.com).

title: Superintendent
notes: Small Shelby County district. New PK-6 building constructed (Freytag & Associates project). Operates PK program. Superintendent serves as primary contact.

title: Interim Superintendent
notes: Leadership transition: prior superintendent Dan Humphrey departed; interim Jim Peterson serving. Knox County district. Email format on fredschools.com domain (jpeterson@fredschools.com per one source) but unconfirmed.

title: Director of Curriculum and Alternative Learning
notes: Confirmed role via Zoominfo (c***@garaway.org). Tuscarawas County district. Email format firstname.lastname@garaway.org or similar likely but not confirmed.

title: Curriculum & Support Services Coordinator
notes: Trumbull County district. Superintendent is Bryan O'Hara. Email format not publicly confirmed.

title: Assistant Superintendent
notes: Bernath oversees Curriculum, Instruction and Assessment department. Licking County. Superintendent is Jeff Brown. Higher-performing suburban district.

title: Superintendent
notes: Licking County district. District forming task force on growth and aging facilities. Pursuing bond/levy for new K-6 elementary — strong investment signal.

title: Curriculum Director
notes: Former literacy coach; strong reading/Science of Reading focus. District uses dual domains hillsdalelocalschools.org (per Zoominfo) and hillsdale.k12.oh.us. Format example: scall@hillsdalelocalschools.org. Likely abaker@hillsdalelocalschools.org. Ashland County.

title: Assistant Superintendent for Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Named to position starting 2024-25 school year. Hudson is a higher-performing Summit County district. Active curriculum review and Science of Reading implementation. Email format firstname.lastname@hudson.k12.oh.us or aterella@hudson.k12.oh.us likely but not confirmed.

title: Director of Curriculum & Federal Programs
notes: Logan County district. ~1,500 students. District uses ils-k12.org email domain. Format likely tebbe_k@ils-k12.org or similar (Zoominfo masked t***@ils-k12.org).

title: Elementary Assistant Principal / Curriculum Director
notes: West Jefferson (Madison County) — small district. Flanik holds dual role as elementary AP and curriculum director. Email format not publicly available.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small Putnam County district. No dedicated curriculum director — superintendent is the ECE decision-maker. Email at kalida.k12.oh.us domain per Zoominfo (k***@kalida.k12.oh.us) but full email unconfirmed.

title: Superintendent
notes: Weagley hired 2024; recent news (Apr-May 2026) suggests he is stepping down before contract end (July 2027). Lorain County. No dedicated curriculum director found publicly. Email at keystonelocalschools.org (masked in Zoominfo).

title: Superintendent
notes: Trumbull County (Cortland). Hired as new superintendent for 2024-25 school year, replacing Velina Jo Taylor. Background includes Director of Federal Programs and Special Ed Teacher — relevant to ECE. Email likely ahandrych@lakeviewlocal.org (Zoominfo masked as as*******@lakeviewlocal.org).

title: Curriculum Director
notes: Trumbull County district (Youngstown area). Email at liberty.k12.oh.us (masked p***@liberty.k12.oh.us). Superintendent is Brian Knight (brian.knight@liberty.k12.oh.us).

title: Superintendent
notes: Van Wert County district. Board approved new contract for Snyder in March 2025. Small district — superintendent is the curriculum decision-maker.

title: Assistant Superintendent
notes: Stark County district. Assistant Superintendent oversees curriculum. Note district uses lepapps.org (Louisville Elementary Plus) for email rather than louisvillecityschools.org.

title: Assistant Superintendent
notes: Hamilton County (Cincinnati suburb). Bergan oversees Curriculum, Instruction, Technology, and Business Operations. Strong alignment with State of Ohio Learning Standards.

title: Superintendent
notes: Manchester Local in Adams County (937 area code; Panther Country). Prior superintendent James Robinson retired after 48 years. Small rural district — superintendent is primary curriculum decision-maker. Email format not publicly confirmed.

title: Director of Curriculum and Staff Development
notes: Stark County district (Alliance). District actively reporting early gains from new K-5 literacy program (Science of Reading aligned) — strong ECE/early literacy buying signal.

title: Superintendent
notes: Muskingum County (Zanesville). Daniels promoted from Assistant Superintendent to Superintendent May 2025 after Brian Blum moved to Northridge Local Schools. Leadership transition. Email format @maysville.k12.oh.us or @maysvillelocal.org likely but unconfirmed.

title: Director of Curriculum & Supervision
notes: STEM-focused charter/affiliated high school (Columbus). Note this is primarily a high school, not a PK-12 district — limited ECE relevance. Superintendent: Meka Pace. Email format is lastname@themetroschool.org.
